h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner progressively clarifies the placement but continually demands a reason for keeping both number jobs visible.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner only re-places cards and restates placement; no new task or device is performed.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: One tile carries two lookup jobs. The top number fixes which element this is: carbon. The bottom decimal gives the mass entry for that identified element.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor merely rephrases the same two-job explanation; no stock-taking or new mechanism.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism present; tutor only repeats the same framing.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn, so no revised framing to adapt to.
